caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The main screen displays a visual map with interconnected nodes, suggesting a network or system of relationships. One node is highlighted, labeled "buying/selling," which seems to be the current focus of discussion. To the right, there is an inset image showing a group of people in what looks like a warehouse or large store, possibly illustrating a real-world example related to buying and selling. The presenter, visible in a small window on the top right, is wearing headphones and appears to be explaining the concepts shown on the screen. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, where the presenter is using visual aids to explain complex ideas about systems and their interactions.
